title: Pecorino and Mediterranean Salad
description: A refreshing salad featuring the flavors of the Mediterranean with the tanginess of Pecorino cheese.

ingredients.name: Mixed Greens
ingredients.notes: Any combination of lettuce, arugula, and spinach

ingredients.name: Pecorino Cheese
ingredients.notes: You can also use Parmesan cheese

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens.

2. In a small bowl, whisk together the Mediterranean salad dressing ingredients: 2 tablespoons olive oil, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 1 minced garlic clove, 1 teaspoon dried oregano, and salt and pepper to taste.
3. Drizzle the dressing over the greens and toss to combine.
4. Sprinkle the Pecorino cheese, crispy capers, and peppery olives over the top.
